nodes.label: Regression tests for PR #2428 — table renderer pipe protection.  These pin three
Extract td/th text content in document order.      Returns the inner HTML of eac
Original #2428 bug: cells containing a single pipe inside parens or     brackets
First version of #2428 fix only protected the first pipe per bracket     pair. T
The first iterative version of the #2428 fix added `'` to the negated     charac
Smoke test — apostrophes that are not part of a pipe-protect range         must
The second half of #2428 — KaTeX `$...$` math spans containing ` | `     must no
The first cut of #2428 included `<` and `>` in the protected-bracket     set. Th
